creator: akosiaris@gmail.com
text:
Just reporting I 've been having the same issue. ssh to the 9.3 box from a recently installed 10.2 succeeded, ssh from a Debian Jessie failed. Version is:

$ ssh -V
OpenSSH_6.7p1 Debian-5+deb8u1, OpenSSL 1.0.1k 8 Jan 2015

A freebsd-update rollback fixed the issue for me.
